creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 174478
proposed patch

Sorry for the delay.

After some work I cooked up the attached patch, which seems to work, without needing ALSA.

The patches are a little "crude", and cannot be upstreamed in this way.

Making upstreamable patches would require much more work though, because the build system would need various fixes to do the correct thing on FreeBSD.

Can you test this patch and report back?

Thanks!
